_doc: A few files exceed the 400-line ceiling. Enabling the biome formatter (2026-06) expanded single-line method/block bodies, growing several files; each is pinned to its formatter-normalized baseline so the check still hard-fails on further drift. database.js is a delegation facade whose one-line pass-throughs biome expands to ~3 lines each — a candidate for splitting the delegation map.

exempt._reason: Search Web Worker — title index, inverted/prefix builders, scoring, and postMessage protocol in one file because Web Workers can't share scope across module boundaries without a bundler. Formatter-normalized baseline (biome).

DocsDatabase delegation facade over the per-domain repos; biome expands its one-line pass-through methods to ~3 lines each. Splitting would only scatter the delegation map. Candidate for a future split. Formatter-normalized baseline (biome).
Web HTML templating cluster (routes -> templates -> context). Formatter-normalized baseline (biome).
Query planner with FTS5/title-exact/trigram/body variants sharing uniform filter + projection logic. Formatter-normalized baseline (biome).
CLI dispatcher (search/read/sync/setup/mcp/web/status). Formatter-normalized baseline (biome); P7 migrates this to a swift-argument-parser CLI.
